subject: green-skinned goblin wearing a miner's helmet lamp, wielding a large mechanical wrench with a flaming gear-wheel end, in a mine
description: A squat, green-skinned goblin with large ears and a wide toothy grin charges forward in a mine or tunnel setting. It wears an oversized miner's helmet with a lit lamp on the front. In one hand it swings a large mechanical wrench-like tool, the head of which contains a spinning flaming gear or cog wheel. Broken wooden planks and debris litter the ground around it. The scene is lit by warm firelight and the lamp, giving the whole image an orange-amber underground glow.
foreground: goblin with mining helmet swinging flaming gear-wrench
background: mine tunnel, broken wooden planks, warm firelight
